title: Won't Kill For Love
overview: The brilliant officer, strategist, and right-hand of the dark lord, Mira, is part of a villainous organization that aims for nothing but chaos and destruction. However, while a perfect elite villain career lay ahead of him, everything changes when one day he meets a girl who wants to stop him...

title: The (taking down of the) magical girl belongs to (no one but) me
overview: Having tea in the park is becoming a daily routine for them. Noticing that the sleeve of Mira's coat is burned, Byakuya sews and applique. "The work of a magical girl isn't as tough as I thought. I'm sure it's thanks to a kind strategist..." says Byakuya.

title: Now Back to the Drawing Board
overview: Mira has to justify to his subjects and comrades why the ground invasion has stalled. His colleagues then advise him to blow off some steam. However, he couldn't have known who he would meet at the establishment his colleague suggested...

title: A Habit of Chasing What Moves
overview: Formalhaut has been assigned to assist Mira in the mission to subdue the magical girls. It's likely that this is also a form of surveillance from the evil king, who has heard rumors that Mira, the evil strategist, is inexplicably infatuated with a magical girl.

title: We're Enemies
overview: While Mira finds himself in a serious gift crisis one day, his subjects have a very special surprise for the officer: they have captured none other than the Magical Girl.

title: What Magical Girls Are
overview: The angelic bird is convinced: it has found a true Magical Girl and will now support her in her role. However, while the young girl feels like she was born for this role, there is a much less noble background behind it all...

title: They're Friends...?
overview: Hibana and Byakuya were friends. Seeing Hibana express her joy at their reunion with a lariat, Mira is a bit bewildered. Byakuya, who had been told by the messenger that she was disqualified as a magical girl, readily accepts it, though she doesn't want to quit.

title: Before Christmas
overview: Byakuya is balancing the accounts when the angelic cat shows up again. But instead of discussing the expenses at length, the cat gives Byakuya an idea: Christmas is just around the corner.

title: On Christmas Night
overview: Byakuya and Mira have planned a cozy evening together at Byakuya's home on Christmas Eve. However, since Byakuya also has to work on Christmas Eve, she has to hurry especially fast...

title: A Day with Mr. Familiar
overview: The day of the Messenger and Byakuya on New Year's Eve is no different from any other day. Byakuya prepares breakfast, wakes up the Messenger, and gets harassed.

title: 53-Year Old Building
overview: Spica and Alcyone are getting excited over a personality test. The theme is, of course, love. "Could it be that Mira is quite infatuated with the magical girl?"

title: Side B / Side M
overview: The evil strategist and the magical girl. Today, the two meet again at their usual park. Sweet treats. Casual chit-chat. These happy days will continue from now on—
